assumptions: Flange is represented semantically; no CAD topology exists in this probe.
Bolt-hole pattern and pipe bore are the protected interfaces.
Flange outer ring is the primary candidate for mass reduction.
Package is definition-sourced and does not contain STEP geometry.
Feature geometry references are semantic-only until geometry generation is implemented.

constraints.reason: Preserve bolt-hole mounting interface; no change to PCD, diameter, or count.
Preserve pipe bore for flow and sealing function.
Raised sealing face geometry must not be modified.
Keep stress below target after mass reduction modifications.
